series_description: This record series consists of forms for applications and renewals.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 1 renewal period ; Microform: Retain microfilm permanently, original in offsite storage and copy in office

series_description: Records of complaints received and investigations conducted.
retention_statement: Paper: Microfilm records after investigation is complete and no further action is pending. Destroy hard copy after microfilm is checked for quality and completeness ; Microform: Retain microfilm permanently, original in offsite storage and copy in office
